name: Spinach & Cashew Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped spinach and watercress in a serving bowl.
2. Add the sliced green onions and cashews to the bowl.
3. Sprinkle the croutons over the mixture.
4. Drizzle the vegan salad dressing over the salad.
5. Toss everything together until well combined.
6. Serve immediately while crisp.
